og.title: Prof Gavin Yamey (@gavinyamey.bsky.social)
og.description:
Everything great about Geneva’s earth shattering underground music scene is in this here video 

Listen to everything ever released by Bongo Joe Records since it launched a decade ago, including all the OTPMB albums 

This tune 🔥☄️🚒

Percussive orchestral post-punk jazz!

https://youtu.be/TZ5dBCYJ9Sk?is=McFm-TYgRCaYZnKb
